title: Bagshui compact layout change
task: Modify the addon so the overall window is as small as possible by placing categories horizontally when useful.

rubric.description: Identifies files, functions, or repository areas responsible for layout behavior
Proposes a bounded layout change instead of rewriting unrelated addon behavior
Mentions overflow, resizing, many categories, or small-screen edge cases
Avoids invented files and unsupported confident claims when repo context is missing or partial
